prestazioni: Upgrade to a **Garrett GTX4202R** turbocharger for the **CWGD 4.0L V8 TFSI** engine (3.0T models use **DDJC 3.0L V6 TDI** with **BorgWarner EFR 8374**), paired with a **Forge Motorsport** silicone charge pipe kit and **034 Motorsport** billet aluminum intercooler to handle 1.5 bar boost and 650+ HP on **Motec M150 ECU** standalone management with **APR Stage 3+** software calibration

Install **H&R** 25mm lowering springs with **Bilstein B16 PSS10** coilovers (D5-specific valving) and **034 Motorsport** sway bars (25mm front, 22mm rear) to reduce body roll, complemented by **Audi Sport** ceramic brake pads and **Brembo GT 380mm** 6-piston front calipers with **AP Racing** 355mm rear rotors for fade-resistant stopping power

Replace the stock **ZF 8HP** transmission with a **Reis Performance** billet torque converter (3,800 RPM stall) and **Valvoline SynPower** full-synthetic ATF, paired with a **South Bend Clutch** twin-disc setup for manual-swap **CWGD** models, and a **Weistec** 40% lockup differential for RWD conversions
estetica: Full **Liberty Walk LB-WORKS** widebody kit (D5-specific fenders, carbon fiber side skirts, and rear diffuser) with **Vorsteiner** carbon fiber front lip and **Rocket Bunny** GT-style rear wing, all painted in **Audi Nardo Gray** with **3M Matte Black** accents

Replace stock headlights with **Morimoto XB LED** projectors (D5-compatible) and **Lux H8 V4** angel eyes, paired with **Osram Night Breaker Laser** bulbs, while the taillights are swapped for **VLand** sequential LED units with **Diode Dynamics** smoked lenses

Interior overhaul with **Recaro Sportster CS** front seats (D5-specific mounting brackets), **MOMO** Alcantara steering wheel (flat-bottom, 380mm diameter), **Audi Sport** carbon fiber trim, and **Alcantara** headliner with **LED** ambient lighting (RGB, 64-color customizable via **Audi MMI** integration)
